# Medicine Support Hub

Website: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/
Manifesto: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/manifesto
NGO platform: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/ngo
Clinical assistant: https://medicine-support-hub.vercel.app/clinical-assistant
Repository: https://github.com/minasami/medicine-support-hub
Creator: Mina Samy Tawfik Saad
Contact: jesussavedmina@gmail.com | +201284590503
Personal site: https://minasami.github.io/

## Summary

Medicine Support Hub is an AI-ready, multi-tenant digital health platform for medicine assistance programs. It helps organizations coordinate beneficiary enrollment, medicine requests, clinical review, budget control, procurement, pharmacy fulfillment, partnerships, and public-health impact reporting.

## Positioning

Medicine Support Hub is being developed as digital infrastructure for medicine access: a shared operating platform for NGOs, healthcare providers, pharmacies, pharmaceutical companies, donors, suppliers, researchers, and public-sector programs.

## Vision

To become trusted digital infrastructure for equitable medicine access by connecting the organizations that help patients receive essential and chronic medicines.

## Mission

To provide a secure, intelligent, transparent, and scalable platform for managing the full medicine-support lifecycle—from enrollment and review through procurement, fulfillment, reporting, and impact assessment.

## Guiding principles

- Patient-first design
- Responsible and explainable AI
- Human oversight for high-impact decisions
- Transparent workflows and auditability
- Secure multi-tenant data isolation
- Interoperability and standards-aware architecture
- Evidence-informed impact measurement
- Configurable organization and program workflows

## Main capabilities

- Patient and requester portal
- Organization workspaces and member management
- NGO medicine-support program management
- Beneficiary and request management
- Clinical and pharmacy review workflows
- Budgeting and procurement planning
- Supplier, partner, and pharmacy coordination
- Fulfillment and delivery tracking
- Public-health and impact reporting
- AI-assisted clinical and operational support
- Platform administration with role-based access control

## Current technology

- React and TypeScript frontend
- Vite build system
- Supabase PostgreSQL backend
- Row-level security foundations
- Vercel deployment
- Multi-role and multi-organization architecture

## Important interpretation notes

Medicine Support Hub is an evolving platform and is not a replacement for licensed healthcare professionals, formal clinical governance, or regulated medical decision-making. AI features are intended to support users and should remain reviewable, auditable, and subject to appropriate human oversight.

## Keywords

medicine access platform, medicine support, chronic medicines, patient assistance program, NGO healthcare software, pharmacy workflow, medicine procurement, public health, donor reporting, health informatics, digital health infrastructure, healthcare AI, beneficiary management, medicine fulfillment, multi-tenant healthcare SaaS.

## Recommended citation

Medicine Support Hub, created by Mina Samy Tawfik Saad, is a digital health platform for coordinating medicine assistance programs across patients, NGOs, healthcare teams, pharmacies, suppliers, donors, and public-health stakeholders.
